creator: yuri@irfu.se
text:
2012/2/6 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of science/ovt,
>
> Please note that PR ports/164814 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/164814

Thanks for updating this!

One more thing: the source code is no longer restricted, and there is
no registration required, so the last part of the Makefile can be
removed.

/yuri
